title: rafinesquia neomexicana
intro: Rafinesquia neomexicana, also known as New Mexico desert chicory or desert chicory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Rafinesquia neomexicana can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional remedies in the form of infusions or decoctions.
